ballpark_pal.description: A one-of-a-kind shape with a deep right field and a 37-foot-tall fence guarding the extremely shallow left side . Similarly, the 18-foot-tall fence in center offsets the close distance to home plate. While the tall fences help neutralize homers, they are excellent targets for singles and doubles .

weather.description: A one-of-a-kind shape with a deep right field and a 37-foot-tall fence guarding the extremely shallow left side . Similarly, the 18-foot-tall fence in center offsets the close distance to home plate. While the tall fences help neutralize homers, they are excellent targets for singles and doubles .

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable-roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. Deep to each side but shallow in the gaps and to center field. The horizontal shape reduces the number of hits that fall into play.

weather.description: A retractable-roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. Deep to each side but shallow in the gaps and to center field. The horizontal shape reduces the number of hits that fall into play.

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

weather.description: A retractable roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. The left side is particularly deep while the right is better primed for homers .

ballpark_pal.description: One of the smallest outfields in MLB , justified by cooler weather and short carry distances. Strikeouts are boosted by low altitude and a tricky batters eye .

weather.description: One of the smallest outfields in MLB , justified by cooler weather and short carry distances. Strikeouts are boosted by low altitude and a tricky batters eye .

ballpark_pal.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

weather.description: One of the smaller outfields in MLB . Relies on tall fences to keep home runs from getting out of hand. The most wind-receptive venue outside of Wrigley.

ballpark_pal.description: A rounded asymmetrical outfield with a very shallow right field wall . The short porch is balanced out by a larger-than-average left field , though still very short to the foul pole on that side.

weather.description: A rounded asymmetrical outfield with a very shallow right field wall . The short porch is balanced out by a larger-than-average left field , though still very short to the foul pole on that side.

ballpark_pal.description: An unevenly shaped outfield with a deep left side . The tall fence in right makes up for a shallow right field corner . Benefits from warm temperatures and relatively high altitude .

weather.description: An unevenly shaped outfield with a deep left side . The tall fence in right makes up for a shallow right field corner . Benefits from warm temperatures and relatively high altitude .

ballpark_pal.description: The largest non-Coors outfield in MLB. Perfectly symmetrical with a 9-foot-tall fence rounding the perimeter.

weather.description: The largest non-Coors outfield in MLB. Perfectly symmetrical with a 9-foot-tall fence rounding the perimeter.

ballpark_pal.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .

weather.description: The temporary home of the Athletics. Highly receptive to the usual out-blowing wind , often pairing with the consistent Summer heat . Features a spacious outfield with a tiny right-field fence . Standard to the corners and center, bowed outward in the gaps .
